description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H, M

This technique summons a single creature, which appears at a location within range and will start acting on your next turn. If the summoned creature has an Intelligence score of 4 or lower, it cannot follow any complicated orders, though it can always be ordered to attack a specific enemy, to not attack at all, or to perform some basic action. If the summoned creature cannot speak, a Sense Motive check (DC 20) can decipher the creature's body language if it is trying to communicate something. This check can only be made by you.

If the creature you intend to summon refuses to be summoned, nothing happens, and no Chakra is paid.

This technique's duration and Chakra cost, as well as the statistics of the summoned creature, are covered in Chapter 12.
